changes.old: To the cabinet at the end of the corridor.
changes.new: To the water-closet at the end of the corridor.
changes.reason: Restores Claude's 'water-closet'; gabinetto here is the period euphemism for the lavatory, not the English false-friend 'cabinet' (cupboard).
